---
title: "NosAnalizamos"
author: "Aleix Cebrián Valero"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Carga de librerías

```{r}
library(pacman)
p_load(tidyverse, mice, knitr, validate, deducorrect, VIM, GGally)
```

# Borrar variables

```{r}
# HACER SIEMPRE
rm(list = ls())
```

# Cargar datos

```{r}
# Averiguar la codificación

#readLines()

guess_encoding("data/NosAutoAnalizamos2022 - Hoja1.tsv")
df <- read_delim("data/NosAutoAnalizamos2022 - Hoja1.tsv",
                 delim = "\t", escape_double = FALSE,
                 trim_ws = TRUE, skip = 25)

head(df)

```
